title: Totem of :GAGAGA: 7tv emote
body:
# 7TV gagaga cat totem

Little resource pack that replaces totem of undying with 7tv :gagaga: emote
The sound has also been replaced with the appropriate one.

Маленький ресурспак, заменяющий тотем бессмертия на эмоут :gagaga: из 7tv.
Так же заменяет звук на мемный звук смеющегося кота

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Tq3y-3pohDg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
